prestazioni: Replace the original experimental Wankel M950F rotary engine with a custom-built **Mercedes-Benz M278 4.7L V8 twin-turbo (M278 DE 46 AL red.)** featuring a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger per bank, ported and polished cylinder heads by **Mahle Motorsport**, and a **Bosch Motorsport MS25.1 ECU** with custom firmware for 1,200+ HP on E85 fuel

Install a **Penske 8760 3-way adjustable coilover suspension** with **Eibach ERS race springs (1,200 lb/in front, 1,500 lb/in rear)** and **AP Racing 6-piston monoblock calipers** clamping **380mm carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-R)** for extreme braking performance

Integrate a **Xtrac P1297 6-speed sequential transaxle** with a **Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch** and **GKN VL3 driveshafts**, paired with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** for optimized power delivery to the rear wheels
estetica: Replace the original fiberglass body panels with **carbon-fiber reinforced polymer (CFRP) panels** from **RML Group**, featuring a **custom 3D-printed front splitter and rear diffuser** designed in collaboration with **Sauber Engineering** for maximum downforce
Install **OMP Carbon-Kevlar racing seats** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and a **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel** wrapped in **Alcantara with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display**

Apply a **custom livery by **BST Carbon Wheels** (20x10 front, 21x12 rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35 R20 front, 325/30 R21 rear)** and **AeroCatch quick-release hood latches** for rapid access to the engine bay
